pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to a newer patch release compatible with Java 21.
Change the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail or produce artifacts incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains at 17.

src/test/java/com/fwai/turtle/api/contro.general_idea: Remove unused static import of Mockito's when method.
